references.hebrew: וְאֶל־אִשָּׁ֖ה בְּנִדַּ֣ת טֻמְאָתָ֑הּ לֹ֣א תִקְרַ֔ב לְגַלּ֖וֹת עֶרְוָתָֽהּ׃
references.english: Do not come near a woman during her menstrual period of impurity to uncover her nakedness.

references.hebrew: אַךְ־בְּ֭שָׂרוֹ עָלָ֣יו יִכְאָ֑ב וְ֝נַפְשׁ֗וֹ עָלָ֥יו תֶּאֱבָֽל׃ {פ}
references.english:
He feels only the pain of his flesh,
And his spirit mourns in him.
